sections.paragraph: m. with suff. קִבְרִי; pl. קְבָרִים constr. קִבְרֵי; and קְבָרֹות constr. קִבְרֹות m., a sepulchre, grave, Gen 23:9, 20 Gen 23:20 Exo 14:11 Num 11:34, 35 Num 11:35 Job 21:32 Jer 26:23, etc.- Job 17:1, קְבָרִים לְי “the graves (are ready) for me;” the burial-place waits for me, and is prepared.
